response.justification: The candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise from GISCollective and Green Map, plus senior-level systems experience from building microservices at Dunnhumby. However, C++ skills are over 10 years outdated (last used 2014-2015) while current focus is TypeScript/Node.js, creating a significant gap in the primary technical requirement. Viability hinges on demonstrated ability to rapidly refresh systems-level C++ proficiency and pick up routing-specific pipeline knowledge.
strengths: Deep geospatial data domain expertise through GISCollective open-source platform and Green Map GIS applications
Senior-level systems thinking demonstrated by building microservices handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby
Proven ability to learn diverse languages and rapidly switch technical contexts across multiple domains (web, mobile, systems, infrastructure)
concerns: C++ experience is 10+ years outdated (2014-2015 at National Instruments); primary recent skills are TypeScript/Node.js, not systems programming
No demonstrated experience with routing optimization, tile generation, data pipeline architecture, or navigation systems
Career trajectory has moved progressively away from systems/infrastructure toward full-stack web and AI/agent workflows
